name: ssh-server-ops
description: Cross-platform SSH bootstrap, diagnostics, transfer fallback, and Linux or HPC remote operations toolkit.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap, diagnose, transfer, and operate SSH workflows from Windows, macOS, or Linux to Linux or HPC targets
interface.longDescription: Use SSH Server Ops to diagnose SSH readiness, repair config and key selection issues, bootstrap password-to-key access, fall back to Paramiko transfers, and run remote Linux or HPC commands from a Windows, macOS, or Linux workstation.
defaultPrompt: Diagnose why SSH to this Linux host only partially works from my local machine.
Bootstrap key-based SSH access for this server and report the next safe action.
Run a read-only SSH diagnosis on this HPC login node and summarize the root cause.
